author: mroguljic
body:
#### PR description:

This PR adds a process customizer that can be used to switch the instances of template pixel CPE ("WithAngleAndTemplate") to generic CPE ("WithTrackAngle"). This is to be used for easier evaluation of generic-only pixel performance requested, for example [here](https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-ppd/dataset-management/data-reprocessing/-/work_items/36). No changes are expected in the output since it is not used in any workflows.

15.1.X backport of: https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50245
title: [15.1.X] Customizer to turn off pixel template cpe
